interactions.stageContent: {"headline":"Transform Your Sales Velocity with Intelligent Automation","callToAction":"See the difference in 30 minutes. We'll generate a live proposal for one of your current deals during a personalized demo.","sections":[{"sectionName":"The Challenge","sectionPurpose":"Problem statement","headlines":["Meridian Dynamics: From Days to Hours on Every Proposal"],"bodyParagraphs":["Meridian Dynamics faces a growing bottleneck: assembling first-contact pagers takes 5-7 business days per opportunity. With a pipeline of 40+ active deals, your team can only personalize outreach for a fraction of prospects. The result -- cold leads and missed revenue targets."],"metrics":[{"value":"5-7 days","label":"Current turnaround per opportunity"},{"value":"40+","label":"Active deals in pipeline"},{"value":"<25%","label":"Prospects receiving personalized outreach"}],"bulletPoints":["First-contact pagers take 5-7 business days to assemble","Pipeline coverage limited by manual bandwidth","Cold leads and missed revenue from slow turnaround"],"speakerNotes":"Lead with the 40+ deal pipeline stat to show scale of the problem."},{"sectionName":"Our Solution","sectionPurpose":"Product overview","headlines":["AI That Understands Your Brand, Prospects, and Industry"],"bodyParagraphs":["AtlusDeck transforms your proposal workflow with AI that understands your brand, your prospects, and your industry positioning. Generate personalized, compliant one-pagers in under 2 hours. Each document draws from your approved template library and adapts messaging to the prospect's specific context."],"bulletPoints":["Personalized one-pagers in under 2 hours","Draws from approved template library automatically","Adapts messaging to prospect-specific context","Full brand and compliance enforcement built in"],"speakerNotes":"Emphasize the template library integration -- this is a key differentiator."},{"sectionName":"Measurable Impact","sectionPurpose":"Value metrics","headlines":["Quantified Results Across Your Sales Pipeline"],"bodyParagraphs":["95% reduction in first-contact turnaround time. 20% lift in prospect engagement rates. 4x increase in proposal capacity with zero additional headcount. Full brand consistency across every deliverable, automatically enforced."],"metrics":[{"value":"95%","label":"Turnaround time reduction"},{"value":"20%","label":"Prospect engagement lift"},{"value":"4x","label":"Proposal capacity increase"},{"value":"0","label":"Additional headcount needed"}],"bulletPoints":["Near-instant first-contact delivery","Higher engagement from personalized outreach","Scale proposal output without scaling team","Automatic brand consistency enforcement"],"speakerNotes":"The zero additional headcount metric resonates strongly with budget-conscious buyers."},{"sectionName":"Get Started Today","sectionPurpose":"Call to action","headlines":["See the Difference in 30 Minutes"],"bodyParagraphs":["See the difference in 30 minutes. We'll generate a live proposal for one of your current deals during a personalized demo."],"bulletPoints":["Live demo using your actual deal data","Full workflow walkthrough in 30 minutes","No commitment required"],"speakerNotes":"Offer to use one of their real current opportunities for maximum impact."}]}
